center.name: 托斯卡納群島
center.summary: 托斯卡納群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Corsican finch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Corsican finch is found on Corsica and Sardinia as well as the islands of Gorgona, Capraia and Elba in the Tuscan Archipelago. During the breeding season the Corsican finch is found from lowland garrigue up to montane areas where it inhabits dry scrub and conifer forests, mainly of European black pine (Pinus nigra) and maritime pine ([[Pinus pinaster|P
